creator: dunc@tiny.net
text:
When I tried to make /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick
it was unable to locate a source tarball.  Apparently
they've reorganized their archive sites.

I found a new list of archive sites at:
http://www.imagemagick.org/www/archives.html

and downloaded successfully from:
http://imagemagick.sourceforge.net/http/ImageMagick-5.3.4.tar.gz

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick
make install
